misconfig_patterns: No authentication on embedding endpoint — any caller can extract vectors at scale
CORS wildcard allows cross-origin embedding extraction
Model identity disclosed in root JSON — model name, backend, quantization level exposed
OpenVINO Model Server backend co-located on port 9000, also unauthenticated

active_probe.false_positive_check: root JSON must contain embedding_dimension as a numeric field alongside model_name or model_id — distinguishes from general health endpoints

deployment_tells: Root GET returns JSON with embedding_dimension, model_name, backend fields — no HTML, no title
OpenVINO Model Server co-located on port 9000 (GET /v1/config reveals model list)
pivot_paths: GET / → model_name field → identify model family (BAAI/bge-*, sentence-transformers/*)
GET /openapi.json → API title + version → custom deployment fingerprint
GET port:9000 /v1/config → OVMS model list → confirm backend model name
GET port:9000 /v1/models/{name}/metadata → TF Serving SignatureDef → input tensor shapes → model architecture inference
backend field (openvino-int8-throughput) → infer Intel CPU deployment, not GPU
